= bool

Converts a value to a boolean with optional fallback

== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `default`^*^
| `bool`
| An optional value to yield if the target cannot be parsed as a boolean.

|===

^*^ Optional parameter

== Examples

[,bloblang]
----
root.foo = this.thing.bool()
root.bar = this.thing.bool(true)
----
